title: ajuga taiwanensis
intro: Ajuga taiwanensis, also known as Taiwan bugleweed or Bugle leaf, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to Taiwan. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ajuga taiwanensis include reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and providing antioxidant protection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including bronchitis and sore throats.
